operational_knowledge_units.title: Tote presence and empty rack are indicated by color in Container Selection
operational_knowledge_units.summary: In the Container Selection Totes view, dark blue indicates a tote is present and light blue represents an empty rack. Selecting the item shows a box icon and the tote number.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack.'
Slide text states: 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'
Slide title and section identify the UI context as 'Container Selection / Totes'.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Container Selection Totes UI reference: dark blue means a tote is present, light blue means the rack is empty. Selecting the item shows a box icon and the tote number.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Totes can be located by tote number in the Container Selection interface
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that a user can find a tote by typing in the tote number and then selecting the rack or AGV where it is located, if the tote exists in the system.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: 'You can also find a tote by typing the number in and selecting the rack or AGV it’s located on if its in the system.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Container Selection Totes allows tote lookup by entering a tote number. If the tote is in the system, the user can identify and select the rack or AGV where it is located.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Find a tote by tote number in Container Selection
preconditions: User is in the Container Selection Totes interface.
The tote may exist in the system.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes the Container Selection Totes screen, including color indicators for tote presence and a tote-number-based lookup that identifies the rack or AGV location.

steps.instruction: In the Container Selection Totes interface, type the tote number into the tote lookup/input area.
steps.expected_outcome: The system uses the entered tote number to look for the tote record.
steps.validation_check: A tote corresponding to the entered number is found if it is in the system.
steps.visual_region_hint: Container Selection Totes screen area containing the tote number entry control.

steps.instruction: Select the rack or AGV where the tote is located.
steps.expected_outcome: The tote location is identified through the selected rack or AGV.
steps.validation_check: The selected rack or AGV corresponds to the tote location when the tote is in the system.
steps.visual_region_hint: Rack or AGV selection area within the Container Selection Totes interface.

warnings: The slide only states this works if the tote is in the system.
The exact field names and click sequence are not shown on the slide.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure candidate for locating a tote in Container Selection: enter the tote number, then select the rack or AGV where the tote is located if the tote exists in the system.
